name: updateMonitor
description: Update an existing Axiom monitor by ID using a full monitor JSON payload. Use checkMonitors() to find monitor IDs before updating.

monitorId.description: The monitor ID. You can find an list of monitors using the `checkMonitors()` tool.

monitorJson.description: The full monitor configuration as a JSON string. Must include name, type, intervalMinutes, rangeMinutes, and at least one of aplQuery or mplQuery.
